ops.title: Spawned agents sometimes go idle without sending their final report — ping them via SendMessage to get the deliverable
ops.body:
Named subagents (Plan agents, codex wrappers) sometimes finish and emit only an `idle_notification` without ever sending their deliverable to main.

**Why:** their final text isn't auto-delivered; if they never called SendMessage, the report sits in their transcript. Happened twice in one cc-notes session (2026-07-08): go-core-planner and ecosystem-planner both went idle silently; a ping recovered full reports both times.

**How to apply:** an idle notification with no preceding report message means send `SendMessage({to: <name>})` asking for the deliverable with an explicit list of what it should contain — the send resumes the agent from its transcript with context intact. Don't re-spawn. Related: [[workflow-structured-output-keep-small]].
